revision.comment: Add encodefirst to prevent Linter and display errors when * # etc. is used as the initial character. Tested in sandbox and with testcases. Please revert if this causes trouble.
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<!-- --><q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<!-- --><q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<!-- --><q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Talk quote inline]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Talk quote inline]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<!-- --><q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[en:Talk quote inline]][[en:Talk quote inline]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q11394737)
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<!-- --><q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q><!-- -->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[en:Talk quote inline]][[en:Talk quote inline]] <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q11394737}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Talk quote inline/styles.css" />{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{FormattingError|Template:Tq is only for quoting in talk and project pages. Do not use it in actual articles.}}|<q {{#if: {{{title|}}} | title="{{{title}}}"}} class="inline-quote-talk {{#if: {{{i|{{{italic|}}}}}} | inline-quote-talk-italic}} {{#if: {{{q|{{{quotes|}}}}}}|inline-quote-talk-marks}}">{{Encodefirst|{{trim|{{{1|Example text}}}}}}}</q>}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q11394737|en|Talk quote inline}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
